title: Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 10 Posts
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (MPSC) has published the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Notification 2026 on 22 April 2026. The recruitment drive aims to fill 10 Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) positions. Candidates within the age range of 18 to 35 years (as on 01 January 2026, with relaxation for reserved categories) and holding a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University along with required computer and Mizo language proficiency are eligible to apply online at Mizoram PSC Official Website. The application process will be active up to 05 June 2026, and candidates can easily access the not

age_limit.details: Minimum Age: 18 years Maximum Age: 35 years Upper age limit relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates or as notified by Government. Age limit as on 01 January 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University, Computer Proficiency as per Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment Rules 2023, Mizo Language Proficiency (exempted if studied Mizo in HSLC or above)
qualification.details: Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University. Computer Proficiency as prescribed by the Mizoram Group ‘A’, ‘B’ and ‘C’ posts Service/Recruitment (Amendment) Rules, 2023. Mizo Language Proficiency as prescribed by the Government (exemption if studied Mizo in HSLC or above).

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC JAO recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Mizoram PSC Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) posts is 05 June 2026. It is advisable to apply well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute technical issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the Junior Accounts Officer post?
faq.answer: There are a total of 10 vacancies announced for the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) position by the Mizoram Public Service Commission in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum and maximum age limit for the JAO post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement for the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) post is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 35 years as of 01 January 2026.

faq.question: Q4. Is there any age relaxation for reserved categories?
faq.answer: Yes, the upper age limit is relaxable up to 5 years for ST/SC candidates, or as per the general guidelines notified by the Government of Mizoram.

faq.question: Q5. What is the educational qualification required for the Junior Accounts Officer role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor’s degree from a recognised University. Additionally, computer proficiency and Mizo language proficiency are required as per the specified rules.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary structure for a Junior Accounts Officer?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) post will be placed at Level-7 in the Pay Matrix, which offers a competitive salary as per government norms.

faq.question: Q7. How can I apply for the Mizoram PSC JAO recruitment?
faq.answer: Applications must be submitted online through the official Mizoram PSC website or the direct application link provided. Ensure all details are accurate and upload necessary documents before the last date.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Junior Accounts Officer position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Accounts Officer (JAO) posts will be based on a General Competitive Examination conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q9. Is there an application fee for the Mizoram PSC JAO application?
faq.answer: As per the notification, there is no application fee mentioned for the PwBD category. For other categories, please refer to the official notification for details on application fees.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification PDF for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page or by visiting the official website of the Mizoram Public Service Commission.
